current_objective: Implement programmatic security guardrails (prompt injection prevention) and code syntax checking in python and ts newsletter pipelines, with a 3-attempt rewrite feedback loop.

steps_completed.action: Created secure-agent-lab root README and committed/pushed all changes.
steps_completed.finding: Created README.md for secure-agent-lab describing security guardrails, test instructions, and running steps. Committed and pushed to secure-agent-lab.git.

steps_completed.action: Untracked nested sub-repository folders from parent repository's index.
steps_completed.finding: Removed secure-agent-lab and ambient-expense-agent folders from the parent git index. Committed and pushed to autonomous-vibe-newsletter-engine.git, keeping it clean.

steps_completed.action: Implemented evaluate_draft_security_and_quality function in agent_pipeline.py and server.ts.
steps_completed.finding: Programmatically validates drafts against prompt injection, unclosed code blocks, and empty code blocks.

steps_completed.action: Integrated the 3-attempt rewrite feedback loop in python and typescript pipelines.
steps_completed.finding: If validation fails, the violations are formatted and sent back as feedback to Agent B, guiding it to rewrite the draft.

steps_completed.action: Verified feedback loop using offline simulation in python runner.
steps_completed.finding: First attempt correctly failed with simulated unclosed block, fed violations back, and second attempt successfully passed.

steps_completed.action: Updated main README.md to document the completed Day 4 Newsletter Security Guardrails deliverables.
steps_completed.finding: Staged and added documentation detail to the roadmap checklist and milestone deliverables sections.

next_step: Ensure all files are committed and pushed to git.
